name: DeXe
analysis: DEXE's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry $18.7368, stop $15.6980, target $23.3700 (1.52:1) — then trail it.
